notes: Trial-tier API token rate-limited (HTTP 429) most endpoints, so the full automated dogfood matrix could not run. Manual live smoke tests (out-of-band) confirmed: /podcasts/search, /podcasts/{id}, /episodes/search, /episodes/{id}, and /categories return 200 with the expected JSON shape; the compound 'mentions', 'guest', 'topic trend', and 'asks' commands return real results. Structural checks (go build, go vet, govulncheck, --help, --version, verify-skill structure) all pass.
